data.body: IMPLEMENTATION PROGRESS: 3 leaves implemented + committed as the local Gerrit stack (HEAD ba58b34de): ac0e(0fb8d17e6, docs), e1f2(2e99d189e, docs), 74d9(ba58b34de, code). 74d9 done under FULL held-out TDD: authored happy+edge tests RED-first, confirmed RED (KeyError scorer-absent), physically held out the 5 edge tests, dispatched an implementation subagent seeing ONLY happy-path+intent, then validated the restored full oracle (5/5 edge pass) and confirmed TEETH (mutation dropping bijectivity → bijective test RED, revert → green). Committed clean through pre-commit lint+typecheck. REMAINING (6 code leaves, held-out-TDD each, then Gerrit push+CI+close): 24ec (completion FAIL sidecar), f32e (impact code-v3), a8e5 (Pass-2 grounding hardening), d4cf (G7 criterion), a37b (drift-refresh default), 9f25 (threshold derivation) -> b9c0 (enable blocking). Then push stack to gerrit refs/for/main, close each leaf after Verified+1 (bottom-up), record epic AC2 measurement-framework comment, close epic. All plans hardened+signed; fully resumable. Held-out edge tests live at /Users/joeoakhart/.claude/jobs/30a17ba2/tmp/heldout for reference.
